achievements: Intelligent nationwide routing (RN1-RN44 + major dirt tracks)
Multi-itinerary choice UI (Shortcut vs Main Road selection)
Automatic arrival time calculation (Departure + Duration sync)
Route-aware search (Intermediary stopovers are now searchable)
Baggage Policy System: size selection (Small/Med/Large) and Roof Rack support
Automatic Ferry (Bac) detection with visual alerts ⛴️
Comprehensive Review & Reputation System: 5-star ratings, passenger comments, and Super Driver badges
Historical Booking Management: Passengers can now track and rate past trips
Role-based Registration: Explicit selection between Traveler and Driver during signup
Strict Profile Photo Policy: Mandatory photo at signup with 'Clear Face' focus rules (Portrait background blur allowed)
Geographical disambiguation with Roman numerals (Antananarivo I, II, III...)
JSX Structural Fix: Resolved syntax errors in My Rides and Signup screens for reliable rendering
